tests.test_name: Cypress - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: A Product Owner uploading a single Cypress test file receives structured JSON documentation with all fields resolved and at least one named test entry.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation is generated and displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel shows results after submitting a single Cypress test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or missing data appears in the downloaded JSON

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is 'cypress'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly identifies the test framework as Cypress

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 1 or more tests with non-empty test names
test_coverage.what_it_checks: At least one test is documented and each has a meaningful name

tests.test_name: Cypress - PO - forEach data-driven expands one test per row
tests.description: A Product Owner uploading a data-driven Cypress test using forEach sees each data row expanded into its own separate documented test entry.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation is generated and displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel shows results after submitting the data-driven forEach Cypress test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or missing data appears in the downloaded JSON

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is 'cypress'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly identifies the test framework as Cypress

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 3 or more tests with non-empty test names
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each data row is expanded into a separate test entry, producing at least 3 named tests

tests.test_name: Cypress - PO - for...of expands one test per row
tests.description: A Product Owner uploading a data-driven Cypress test using for...of sees each data row expanded into its own separate documented test entry.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation is generated and displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel shows results after submitting the for...of Cypress test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or missing data appears in the downloaded JSON

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is 'cypress'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly identifies the test framework as Cypress

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 3 or more tests with non-empty test names
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each data row is expanded into a separate test entry, producing at least 3 named tests

tests.test_name: Cypress - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: A QA Manager uploading a single Cypress test file receives structured JSON documentation that includes a populated test coverage matrix alongside standard test details.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation is generated and displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel shows results after submitting a single Cypress test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or missing data appears in the downloaded JSON

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is 'cypress'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly identifies the test framework as Cypress

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 1 or more tests with non-empty test names
test_coverage.what_it_checks: At least one test is documented and each has a meaningful name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry for the test

tests.description: A QA Manager uploading a data-driven Cypress test using forEach sees all data rows collapsed into a single test entry with a coverage matrix row for each data example.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation is generated and displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel shows results after submitting the data-driven forEach Cypress test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or missing data appears in the downloaded JSON

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is 'cypress'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly identifies the test framework as Cypress

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has exactly 1 test with a non-empty test name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All data rows are collapsed into a single named test entry rather than expanded

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the number of examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each data row from the forEach loop is represented as a row in the coverage matrix

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for 'cypress'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row contains the expected fields for a Cypress test
